TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Palimo, title = Palimo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Palimo} }

S.FORM: Palimo O manmaan a demakan nano rayray no to'as ko pifetir hananay, misaali sapalemed ato pi'howid to to'as ko "palimo" hananay, talolong o tadamaanay ko lisin ko tatodong nira. Toni itira i Fata'an niyaro' no Tafalong ko "piilisin", nano rayray no to'as ko tatinakoen ko sasowalen i laeno. Pakaynien i radiw sakero ko papinang to to'as- ko pi'ahowid ato pingodo to cidal ko ilisin no Tafalong a niyaro' no Pangcah, o rakat no demak matomes to ngodo to to'as ato kalimela to tala'ayaway ho a kapah to saka'orip. Tada makadofah ko radiw no Tafalong a niyaro', itini i pisalisin a demak o radiw ko sapato'aya, malolalan sakatayra i kanatal no salo'afang. O radiw no finacadan mirekoay to nasaripa'an no tato'asan, o radiw ko sapakafana' to rotoh a sowalato sakarayray no niyaro'. I kailisinan, ira ko misa'edes ato misalahoday, roma i mangaay pakiradiwen sapa'icel to kasaselal to fana' to sakiilisin a demak. O kasaselal ira ko kananaman nangra a radiw, orasaka masamaanay ko radiw makafana' to no maan a selalan ko romadiway. Polong no sakiilisin a demak no Tafalong, ora koya sapalemed ato sapi'ahowiday a demak "mifetir " Oni ko nika tadamaan. "Kailisinan " a romi'ad, o fafahiyan no Tafalong a niyaro', o winawina mikerid to fafahiyan a wawa nira tayra i kailisinan, no tireng misaepahan a kani', hacecacecay sa palimo to tomok palemed, matiniay a " palimo" a demak o karaheker no finacadan a mapalemed sakalihaday no nilongocan, roma i pihinom pakaolah no fafahiyan toni cecay a mihecan to paini a maroray to saki niyaro' ato sakalihaday lipahak ko 'orip no parod. O sapalimo no rarem to mato'asay, palimo a mingodo ko fafahiyan to fa'inayan, onini a cecay a takid to ni sakani'an a " Salang no epah" sapaini patalahekal to nano faloco'an a pi'ahowid no faloco', onini koya nisowalan to "kailisinan " a romi'ad to pinangan no demak, o sakadiheko matomesay to sapinanay ko tatodong noni ilisin. Pi'arawan to lakaw "19:27-32.
S.PHON: paɾimo~u o~u manmaan a ɬ~ɮəmakan nano~u rajraj no~u to~uʡas ko~u pifətir ħananaj, misaaɾi sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ ato~u piʡħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u to~uʡas ko~u "paɾimo~u" ħananaj, taɾo~uɾo~uŋ o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ko~u ɾisin ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ nira. to~uni itira i fataʡan nijaro~uʡ no~u tafaɾo~uŋ ko~u "piiɾisin", nano~u rajraj no~u to~uʡas ko~u tatinako~uən ko~u saso~uwaɾən i ɾaəno~u. pakajniən i raɬ~ɮiw sakəro~u ko~u papinaŋ to~u to~uʡas- ko~u piʡaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ ato~u piŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ko~u iɾisin no~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ no~u paŋʦaħ, o~u rakat no~u ɬ~ɮəmak mato~uməs to~u ŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u to~uʡas ato~u kaɾiməɾa to~u taɾaʡajawaj ħo~u a kapaħ to~u sakaʡo~urip. taɬ~ɮa makaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ ko~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, itini i pisaɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u raɬ~ɮiw ko~u sapato~uʡaja, maɾo~uɾaɾan sakatajra i kanataɾ no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ. o~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan mirəko~uaj to~u nasaripaʡan no~u tato~uʡasan, o~u raɬ~ɮiw ko~u sapakafanaʡ to~u ro~uto~uħ a so~uwaɾato~u sakarajraj no~u nijaro~uʡ. i kaiɾisinan, ira ko~u misaʡəɬ~ɮəs ato~u misaɾaħo~uɬ~ɮaj, ro~uma i maŋaaj pakiraɬ~ɮiwən sapaʡiʦəɾ to~u kasasəɾaɾ to~u fanaʡ to~u sakiiɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u kasasəɾaɾ ira ko~u kananaman naŋra a raɬ~ɮiw, o~urasaka masamaanaj ko~u raɬ~ɮiw makafanaʡ to~u no~u maan a səɾaɾan ko~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj. po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sakiiɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~ura ko~uja sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ ato~u sapiʡaħo~uwiɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak "mifətir " o~uni ko~u nika taɬ~ɮamaan. "kaiɾisinan " a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u fafaħijan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u winawina mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u fafaħijan a wawa nira tajra i kaiɾisinan, no~u tirəŋ misaəpaħan a kaniʡ, ħaʦəʦaʦəʦaj sa paɾimo~u to~u to~umo~uk paɾəməɬ~ɮ, matiniaj a " paɾimo~u" a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u karaħəkər no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a mapaɾəməɬ~ɮ sakaɾiħaɬ~ɮaj no~u niɾo~uŋo~uʦan, ro~uma i piħino~um pakao~uɾaħ no~u fafaħijan to~uni ʦəʦaj a miħəʦan to~u paini a maro~uraj to~u saki nijaro~uʡ ato~u sakaɾiħaɬ~ɮaj ɾipaħak ko~u ʡo~urip no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ. o~u sapaɾimo~u no~u rarəm to~u mato~uʡasaj, paɾimo~u a miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ko~u fafaħijan to~u faʡinajan, o~unini a ʦəʦaj a takiɬ~ɮ to~u ni sakaniʡan a " saɾaŋ no~u əpaħ" sapaini pataɾaħəkaɾ to~u nano~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡan a piʡaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, o~unini ko~uja niso~uwaɾan to~u "kaiɾisinan " a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u pinaŋan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u sakaɬ~ɮiħəko~u mato~uməsaj to~u sapinanaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~uni iɾisin. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw "**:**-**.
S.FORM: Palimo O manmaan a demakan nano rayray no to'as ko pifetir hananay, misaali sapalemed ato pi'howid to to'as ko "palimo" hananay, talolong o tadamaanay ko lisin ko tatodong nira. Toni itira i Fata'an niyaro' no Tafalong ko "piilisin", nano rayray no to'as ko tatinakoen ko sasowalen i laeno. Pakaynien i radiw sakero ko papinang to to'as- ko pi'ahowid ato pingodo to cidal ko ilisin no Tafalong a niyaro' no Pangcah, o rakat no demak matomes to ngodo to to'as ato kalimela to tala'ayaway ho a kapah to saka'orip. Tada makadofah ko radiw no Tafalong a niyaro', itini i pisalisin a demak o radiw ko sapato'aya, malolalan sakatayra i kanatal no salo'afang. O radiw no finacadan mirekoay to nasaripa'an no tato'asan, o radiw ko sapakafana' to rotoh a sowalato sakarayray no niyaro'. I kailisinan, ira ko misa'edes ato misalahoday, roma i mangaay pakiradiwen sapa'icel to kasaselal to fana' to sakiilisin a demak. O kasaselal ira ko kananaman nangra a radiw, orasaka masamaanay ko radiw makafana' to no maan a selalan ko romadiway. Polong no sakiilisin a demak no Tafalong, ora koya sapalemed ato sapi'ahowiday a demak "mifetir " Oni ko nika tadamaan. "Kailisinan " a romi'ad, o fafahiyan no Tafalong a niyaro', o winawina mikerid to fafahiyan a wawa nira tayra i kailisinan, no tireng misaepahan a kani', hacecacecay sa palimo to tomok palemed, matiniay a " palimo" a demak o karaheker no finacadan a mapalemed sakalihaday no nilongocan, roma i pihinom pakaolah no fafahiyan toni cecay a mihecan to paini a maroray to saki niyaro' ato sakalihaday lipahak ko 'orip no parod. O sapalimo no rarem to mato'asay, palimo a mingodo ko fafahiyan to fa'inayan, onini a cecay a takid to ni sakani'an a " Salang no epah" sapaini patalahekal to nano faloco'an a pi'ahowid no faloco', onini koya nisowalan to "kailisinan " a romi'ad to pinangan no demak, o sakadiheko matomesay to sapinanay ko tatodong noni ilisin. Pi'arawan to lakaw "19:27-32.
S.PHON: paɾimo~u o~u manmaan a ɬ~ɮəmakan nano~u rajraj no~u to~uʡas ko~u pifətir ħananaj, misaaɾi sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ ato~u piʡħo~uwiɬ~ɮ to~u to~uʡas ko~u "paɾimo~u" ħananaj, taɾo~uɾo~uŋ o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ko~u ɾisin ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ nira. to~uni itira i fataʡan nijaro~uʡ no~u tafaɾo~uŋ ko~u "piiɾisin", nano~u rajraj no~u to~uʡas ko~u tatinako~uən ko~u saso~uwaɾən i ɾaəno~u. pakajniən i raɬ~ɮiw sakəro~u ko~u papinaŋ to~u to~uʡas- ko~u piʡaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ ato~u piŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ko~u iɾisin no~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ no~u paŋʦaħ, o~u rakat no~u ɬ~ɮəmak mato~uməs to~u ŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u to~uʡas ato~u kaɾiməɾa to~u taɾaʡajawaj ħo~u a kapaħ to~u sakaʡo~urip. taɬ~ɮa makaɬ~ɮo~ufaħ ko~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, itini i pisaɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u raɬ~ɮiw ko~u sapato~uʡaja, maɾo~uɾaɾan sakatajra i kanataɾ no~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ. o~u raɬ~ɮiw no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan mirəko~uaj to~u nasaripaʡan no~u tato~uʡasan, o~u raɬ~ɮiw ko~u sapakafanaʡ to~u ro~uto~uħ a so~uwaɾato~u sakarajraj no~u nijaro~uʡ. i kaiɾisinan, ira ko~u misaʡəɬ~ɮəs ato~u misaɾaħo~uɬ~ɮaj, ro~uma i maŋaaj pakiraɬ~ɮiwən sapaʡiʦəɾ to~u kasasəɾaɾ to~u fanaʡ to~u sakiiɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u kasasəɾaɾ ira ko~u kananaman naŋra a raɬ~ɮiw, o~urasaka masamaanaj ko~u raɬ~ɮiw makafanaʡ to~u no~u maan a səɾaɾan ko~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj. po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sakiiɾisin a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u tafaɾo~uŋ, o~ura ko~uja sapaɾəməɬ~ɮ ato~u sapiʡaħo~uwiɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak "mifətir " o~uni ko~u nika taɬ~ɮamaan. "kaiɾisinan " a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u fafaħijan no~u tafaɾo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, o~u winawina mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u fafaħijan a wawa nira tajra i kaiɾisinan, no~u tirəŋ misaəpaħan a kaniʡ, ħaʦəʦaʦəʦaj sa paɾimo~u to~u to~umo~uk paɾəməɬ~ɮ, matiniaj a " paɾimo~u" a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u karaħəkər no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan a mapaɾəməɬ~ɮ sakaɾiħaɬ~ɮaj no~u niɾo~uŋo~uʦan, ro~uma i piħino~um pakao~uɾaħ no~u fafaħijan to~uni ʦəʦaj a miħəʦan to~u paini a maro~uraj to~u saki nijaro~uʡ ato~u sakaɾiħaɬ~ɮaj ɾipaħak ko~u ʡo~urip no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ. o~u sapaɾimo~u no~u rarəm to~u mato~uʡasaj, paɾimo~u a miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u ko~u fafaħijan to~u faʡinajan, o~unini a ʦəʦaj a takiɬ~ɮ to~u ni sakaniʡan a " saɾaŋ no~u əpaħ" sapaini pataɾaħəkaɾ to~u nano~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡan a piʡaħo~uwiɬ~ɮ no~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, o~unini ko~uja niso~uwaɾan to~u "kaiɾisinan " a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u pinaŋan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, o~u sakaɬ~ɮiħəko~u mato~uməsaj to~u sapinanaj ko~u tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~uni iɾisin. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw "**:**-**.
